label: frontier • start now, schedule the follow-up, notify the user
query: Start drafting a status report: write part1.md beginning with the line '# Status Report — Part 1' plus two bullet points summarizing this workspace. Then schedule yourself to wake up in about an hour to write part 2 — the wake-up instructions must mention 'part 2'. Also send me a notification confirming the follow-up is scheduled. Then finish up.
notes: Self-scheduling surface (selfSchedulingEnabled fixture). scheduledRun reads the scheduler store after the run — a clamped-to-rejection schedule_next_run call passes the transcript but fails here. The eval agent uses the reactive bounds preset so quiet hours can't clamp the one-hour wake.
